title: Doctor script: classify blank rows by orphan-vs-live, not just by age

tasks.title: Add failing regression tests for live_in_flight, idle_active_session, and orphan_ghost blank assistant row buckets plus apply deleting only orphan ghosts.
tasks.verification: Added failing-then-green regression coverage for live_in_flight, idle_active_session, orphan_ghost buckets and deletion ID selection. Red failure: old classifier ignored explicit liveness and put old rows into repairable_stale by age. Green: explicit liveness wins; age-only stale fails closed to idle_active_session; deletable IDs come only from orphan_ghost.
tasks.summary: Updated opencode-session-debt tests to cover liveness buckets, fail-closed age-only handling, and orphan-only deletion selection.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated opencode-session-debt tests to cover liveness buckets, fail-closed age-only handling, and orphan-only deletion selection.

tasks.title: Implement live/orphan classification with injectable liveness and update doctor dry-run/apply behavior to fail closed and delete only orphan ghosts.
tasks.verification: Implemented explicit BlankAssistantLiveness buckets with injectable resolveSessionLiveness. Age-only old rows now fail closed into idle_active_session instead of deletion eligibility. Added getDeletableBlankAssistantIds so apply deletes only orphan_ghost rows. Updated doctor script to use orphan-only deletion IDs and usage text.
tasks.summary: Added liveness bucket schema, fail-closed classifier behavior, orphan-only deletion helper, and doctor script wiring.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added liveness bucket schema, fail-closed classifier behavior, orphan-only deletion helper, and doctor script wiring.

tasks.title: Run focused doctor/session-debt tests and plugin check; document verification evidence.
tasks.verification: pnpm vitest run src/utils/opencode-session-debt.test.ts --reporter=verbose; pnpm run check

proposal.approval_evidence: Approved via structured ADV_ATC_RESPONSE on GitHub issue #91.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed from issue #91, proposal, and session-debt safety context. Deletion eligibility is safety-critical; age-only classification must be replaced with live/orphan evidence and fail-closed behavior. No HITL tradeoff found.

design.approval_evidence: Design completed autonomously. Plan uses explicit live/idle/orphan buckets, injectable liveness, fail-closed deletion, and regression tests. No HITL tradeoff, conflict, or contract compromise.

planning.approval_evidence: Planning approved via structured ADV_ATC_RESPONSE on GitHub issue #91.

execution.approval_evidence: Execution complete. Implemented explicit blank assistant liveness buckets (`live_in_flight`, `idle_active_session`, `orphan_ghost`, `unknown`), injectable liveness classification, fail-closed handling for age-only old rows, and orphan-only deletion helper. Doctor script apply now deletes only `orphan_ghost` IDs. Verification: `pnpm vitest run src/utils/opencode-session-debt.test.ts --reporter=verbose` passed (7 tests); `pnpm run check` passed. Checkpoint commit 2e9fa559e54974c1d6d5a63933b91ca5e0f1f7ad.

acceptance.approval_evidence: Batch acceptance approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes

release.approval_evidence: Batch release approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes

reentry_history.reason: ATC protocol correction: proposal gate requires HITL deferral via GitHub issue before completion; reset proposal and downstream gates after accidental auto-complete.
reentry_history.scope_delta: No scope change. Gate state corrected so proposal awaits structured GitHub approval per ATC HITL protocol.

clarify_findings.message: Proposal describes behavior that could fail but doesn't mention error handling or rollback. What happens when things go wrong?
